body:
bugs:

- `Δy = minimum_xspacing(grid)`
- some leftover `Δt_max` was changed to `max_Δt`
- when computing `substeps` via cfl then we need to ensure it's an integer

labels.description: Even a perfect program still has bugs
labels.name: bug 🐞

title: Fix few bugs + improve docstring of `SplitExplicitFreeSurface`
